home.label: Dashboard
home.summary: Quick overview — KPIs, recent activity, and quick actions.

scan.label: AI hub
scan.summary: Scanning, source notebook, in-org document decode, and issuance generators in one screen.

crm.label: Clients
crm.summary: Manage {clients}, projects, and quotes in one place.

operations.label: Operations
operations.summary: Employee attendance, field work, and team processes.

settings.label: Settings
settings.summary: Organization, trade, team, and billing settings.

help.label: Help
help.summary: A short guide, clear workflow, and shortcuts to main screens.

business.label: Business hub
business.summary: Cross-view of clients, documents, pricing, and operations.

intelligence.label: Intelligence
intelligence.summary: Executive AI, cross-cutting insights, and decision tracking.

admin.label: Admin
admin.summary: OS control, broadcasts, subscriptions, and operator health.

success.label: Success
success.summary: Confirm your path and move quickly to the next step.

advanced.label: Advanced tools
advanced.summary: Central access to deep tools, bridges, and advanced systems.

advancedPage.title: BSD-YBM’s deep tools are organized here without cluttering your daily workspace.
advancedPage.subtitle: The default is the `/app` environment, but when you need deeper control, advanced analysis, or expert tools, everything is grouped in one clear place.

onboarding.title: Smart onboarding
onboarding.body: A setup wizard that turns your organization’s state into clear steps: trade, connections, subscription, portal, and documents.

automations.title: Automation Center
automations.body: One hub for automations, recommended scripts, and flows tied to documents, billing, and clients.

portal.title: Client Portal
portal.body: Manage the public portal, domain, document sharing, and what clients see outside the internal app.

inbox.title: Advanced control center
inbox.body: Monitoring, control, and deep workflows for ops and management teams.

clients.title: Advanced CRM
clients.body: Full CRM tools when you need deeper control, reports, and power features.

ai.title: Advanced AI Hub
ai.body: AI tabs, scanners, and deeper analytics for advanced work.

settings.title: Advanced settings
settings.body: The full settings center for areas that need finer control over org and integrations.

operations.title: Advanced operations
operations.body: Workflows, team deep tools, and processes across departments or systems.

meckano.title: Meckano
meckano.body: The dedicated field module stays here as an advanced workspace for entitled subscribers only.

workspaceHome.subtitle: Your business command center — clients and finance, deciphered by AI.
workspaceHome.dualAxisAria: Two business axes — clients and finance

aiNarrative.empty: All quiet. No anomalies, delays, or opportunities detected today.

axisFinance.title: Cash flow & what the business produces

recentActivity.title: Recent documents & activity

startHere.title: Three links

startHere.navHint: More areas in the workspace menu.

workspaceHome.footerHint: Set your trade in settings. Upload documents from the documents screen.

projects.pickerDesc: Select a project before opening the control center

fieldCopilot.projectsEmpty: No projects — create one in CRM
fieldCopilot.driveNotSaved: Not saved to Drive — file kept in app
fieldCopilot.cameraError: Camera access denied — allow permission in your browser
fieldCopilot.analysisSubtitle: Builds BOQ and quote — you fill prices manually
fieldCopilot.disclaimer: Draft — professional review required before sending
fieldCopilot.produceSubtitle: Open document creator with prefilled data
fieldCopilot.constructionOnly: Field Copilot is for construction trades only
fieldCopilot.videoUnsupportedIos: Video recording is not supported in this browser — try updated Safari

history.title: Previous sessions
history.subtitle: Select an existing session or start new

appBuilder.title: AI App Builder
appBuilder.subtitle: Describe any idea — the builder creates custom UI or runs the platform (CRM, invoices, scan, tasks…)
appBuilder.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Client intake form with name, phone, meeting date and quote amount
appBuilder.generateError: Failed to generate UI — try rephrasing
appBuilder.emptyPreview: Chat what to build — e.g. “Dashboard with 5 expense and project metric cards”
appBuilder.previewUpdated: Preview updated — click Save app to persist
appBuilder.refineFailed: I couldn't apply that change. Try rephrasing your request more clearly.
appBuilder.chatEmptyTitle: What should we build or change?
appBuilder.chatEmptySubtitle: Describe any idea — form, dashboard, open CRM, invoice, scan, task… The builder creates UI or runs the platform for you.
appBuilder.chatPlaceholder: e.g. contacts dashboard, site checklist form, open CRM, create invoice…
appBuilder.templateLoaded: Template loaded — edit and save as your own app
appBuilder.shareIdeaLabel: Share idea with the community (no personal data)
appBuilder.shareIdeaHint: The idea is saved anonymously and helps us build new templates for everyone
appBuilder.shareIdeaSuccess: Thank you! Your idea has been saved 🙏
appBuilder.saveSchemaSuccess: App saved — you can submit the form
appBuilder.saveDashboardSuccess: Dashboard saved — open it from My apps
appBuilder.editPromptHint: To change the UI: describe what to change and click “Update with AI” (or “Generate UI” to preview). Without a prompt, “Update app” saves name and description only.
appBuilder.recordsEmpty: No records yet. Add one using the form.
appBuilder.recordsPreviewEmpty: Save the app to store and view records.
appBuilder.saveFullAppSuccess: App saved — you can add records and view them in the table
appBuilder.actionRunnerUnavailable: Cannot run actions from this view
appBuilder.noPreview: Nothing to save — generate UI first
appBuilder.saveSchemaFirst: Save the app before submitting data
appBuilder.tablePreviewHint: Column preview — data rows will appear after saving

helpCenter.aiChatPrompt: I have a question about using BSD-YBM

settings.title: System settings
settings.subtitle: Business details, logo, and global notifications
settings.vatHint: Israel default: 18% (May 2025). Applies to invoices and quotes.
settings.uploadLogoDesc: SVG is recommended for best quality across the app and documents.
settings.driveIntro: Default Drive folder for two-way sync with the system. If there is no refresh token, sign out and sign in again with Google (full permissions).

calendar.intro: We suggest syncing your calendar — you choose when to connect, approve, and pick a sync mode.
calendar.orgDisabled: Google Calendar is disabled for this organization. Contact your admin.
calendar.subscriptionRequired: An active subscription is required to connect Google Calendar.
calendar.suggestBody: Connect Google Calendar for event reminders — nothing syncs until you approve.
calendar.modeReadOnlyDesc: Show Google events and push reminders — no writes back.
calendar.modeBidirectionalDesc: Tasks with dates sync to Google; Google changes update the app.
calendar.consentText: I understand the app will access my chosen Google Calendar only after I tap Enable sync.

settings.assignIntro: The user must sign in with Google at least once before assignment. After assignment, sign out and back in refreshes Gemini Live and API permissions.
settings.securityDesc: These settings sync directly to the Organization table in PostgreSQL. They affect invoice headers, quotes, and system notifications sent to clients.

errors.invalidImage: Please choose an image file (SVG preferred)
errors.assignEmailRequired: Enter the email of a user who has signed in at least once
errors.assignNoOrg: No organization ID found for assignment

toast.assignedHint: For Gemini Live and permissions to refresh immediately, ask the user to sign out and back in.

settings.confirmUnverifiedEmail: Email {email} is not verified yet. Resend verification email?
settings.savedSuccess: Industry and specialization updated — consider refreshing the page

empty.subtitle: BSD-YBM OS is ready. Pick a quick action or type a command in the {omnibar}.

onboarding.title: First day in BSD-YBM
onboarding.desc_login: You are connected — let's tour the Hub tiles on your desktop.
onboarding.desc_finance: Open the Finance hub for dashboard and cash flow in one place.
onboarding.desc_drive: Google Drive lives in the side rail (not inside Documents hub). Tap to open.
onboarding.desc_scan: Open Documents hub → Scan tab for the AI invoice scanner.
onboarding.desc_document: Create your first quote or invoice from Documents → Create.
onboarding.desc_fieldCopilot: Field Copilot — site quotes with capture and AI analysis.

launcher.editHint: Drag tiles to grid cells · X to remove · Tap empty cell or + to add
launcher.v2MigrationBanner: Desktop updated: 6 Hub tiles in the center. Google Drive and Meckano reports are in the side rail — long-press tiles to add apps.

commands.openingAiChat: Opening AI chat with your request
commands.meckanoNoPermission: You are not allowed to report attendance in this system

omnibar.placeholder: Type a command, e.g. clients, scan, Herzliya project
omnibar.chatEmptyHint: Type a command or tap the mic — replies appear here

googleCalendar.emptySuggest: Connect and enable sync in Settings — we only suggest; you opt in.

projectBoard.deleteConfirm: Delete this task? This cannot be undone.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.emptySubtitle: I can analyze financial data, help manage projects, or answer professional questions.
aiChat.liveStatusConnected: Gemini Live connected. You can speak.
aiChat.liveStatusFallback: Gemini Live is available after sign-in and org assignment.
aiChat.liveSessionExpired: Voice connection expired before setup finished. Tap the microphone to try again.
aiChat.liveInternalError: Google Gemini Live returned an internal error. Try again in a moment; if it persists, contact your administrator.
aiChat.liveConnectionFailed: Could not connect to Gemini Live. Check your internet connection and try again.
aiChat.liveRateLimited: Gemini Live rate limit reached. Try again at {retryAt}.
aiChat.liveContextLoading: Could not prepare the voice assistant — try again in a moment
aiChat.placeholder: Ask me anything about your projects…

takeoff.emptyHint: Upload a drawing image (PNG/JPG) to start measuring
